INTEREST_VISUAL_DESIGN.description: Interest in how things look, visual layout, making things visually appealing

INTEREST_USER_EXPERIENCE.description: Interest in how people use things, making things easy to use, understanding user needs

INTEREST_DATA_WORK.description: Interest in working with information, numbers, finding patterns in data, measuring things

INTEREST_PREDICTIVE_ANALYTICS.description: Interest in predicting outcomes, forecasting, using patterns to make predictions

INTEREST_SYSTEM_BUILDING.description: Interest in building systems that work behind the scenes, making things run smoothly

INTEREST_QUALITY_ASSURANCE.description: Interest in making sure things work correctly, testing, finding problems before they happen

INTEREST_RELIABILITY_MAINTENANCE.description: Interest in keeping things running, preventing problems, monitoring and fixing issues

INTEREST_PROTECTION_SECURITY.description: Interest in protecting systems and information, preventing unauthorized access, safety

INTEREST_PLANNING_STRATEGY.description: Interest in planning, prioritizing, organizing work, making strategic decisions

INTEREST_INSIGHTS_ANALYSIS.description: Interest in understanding why things happen, finding insights, making data useful

INTEREST_AUTOMATION.description: Interest in making repetitive tasks automatic, saving time through automation

INTEREST_RAPID_EXPERIMENTATION.description: Interest in quickly trying new ideas, experimenting, building prototypes fast

INTEREST_EXPLANATION_WRITING.description: Interest in explaining things clearly, writing documentation, helping others understand

INTEREST_PRESENTING_INFORMATION.description: Interest in showing information visually, creating charts and graphs, making data understandable

INTEREST_SCALABLE_DESIGN.description: Interest in designing systems that can handle growth, building for scale, architecture

TRAIT_CREATIVITY.description: Creative thinking, coming up with new ideas, innovation

TRAIT_ANALYTICAL.description: Logical thinking, careful reasoning, problem-solving step by step

TRAIT_ATTENTION_TO_DETAIL.description: Paying close attention to details, being thorough and precise

TRAIT_COLLABORATIVE.description: Working well with others, team player, cooperation

TRAIT_COMMUNICATION.description: Explaining things clearly, good at talking and writing, helping others understand

TRAIT_RESILIENCE.description: Handling pressure well, bouncing back from setbacks, adapting to challenges

TRAIT_EMPATHY.description: Understanding how others feel, caring about users and people's needs

TRAIT_DECISIVENESS.description: Making decisions confidently, being assertive, leadership

TRAIT_CURIOSITY.description: Wanting to learn, exploring new things, growth mindset

TRAIT_ORGANIZATION.description: Liking structure and organization, systematic approach, planning ahead

TRAIT_FLEXIBILITY.description: Adapting to change, comfortable with uncertainty, flexible approach

ORIENTATION_DATA_ORIENTED.description: Focus on data, numbers, measurements, making decisions based on evidence

ORIENTATION_SYSTEM_ORIENTED.description: Focus on how systems work, infrastructure, technical depth

ORIENTATION_PEOPLE_FOCUSED.description: Focus on people and users, customer experience, human-centered

ORIENTATION_BUSINESS_FOCUSED.description: Focus on business value, impact, strategic thinking, results that matter

ORIENTATION_TECHNOLOGY_FOCUSED.description: Focus on technology, new tools, innovation, cutting-edge solutions

ORIENTATION_RESEARCH_FOCUSED.description: Focus on deep investigation, research, understanding root causes

ORIENTATION_RESULTS_FOCUSED.description: Focus on getting things done, delivering outcomes, execution

ORIENTATION_EXCELLENCE_FOCUSED.description: Focus on quality, doing things well, craftsmanship, high standards

ORIENTATION_SPEED_FOCUSED.description: Focus on moving fast, rapid iteration, quick results

ORIENTATION_STABILITY_FOCUSED.description: Focus on reliability, consistency, long-term thinking
